-- 3 of 18 --

HOOKS, THEMES,
& IDEAS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 18 --

WE WANT TO 	AVOID
The Categorical Imperative
UNRESOLVED
DISTRESS
“Hmmm. Can I put this into a bucket I already know?”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 18 --

“I’ve seen that before!
I’ve heard that before!”
PREVENT 	MENTAL OPT-OUT!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 18 --

HOOK SHOULD TRIGGER:
• “Wow, this is interesting.”
• “Hmmm, I haven’t heard this before.”
• “This feels newsworthy.”
• “OMG! This is big!”
• “Holy moly, this could change everything!”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 18 --

THE “HOOK” RULE OF ONE
• Based on one narrative/storyline
• Presents one promise
• Prods one core emotion
• Leads prospect to think one thing
Weak marketing messages are crowded with mediocre ideas.
You must narrow it down to one idea.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 18 --

TWO IDEAS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 18 --

PROMISE + CURIOSITY!
THE FOUNDATION OF A HOOK:
• “I have to know more!”
• “How can that be?”
• “Sounds awesome, but… what is it?”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 18 --

HOOK CHECKLIST
✓ 	Follows “Hook” Rule of One
✓ 	Big, believable promise of result
✓ 	New & Fresh (Timely)
✓ 	Specific, concrete, tangible
✓ 	Intellectually interesting
✓ 	Easy to grasp
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 18 --

AVOID
The Curse Of Knowledge
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 18 --

What Is An 	Extraordinary
Way Of Presenting
The Ordinary?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 18 --

INPUT + CONNECTIONS
FINDING SEEDS OF HOOKS:
• Hooks/Ideas are developed, not discovered
• Hooks/Ideas are all about looking for new or
unusual combinations and/or connections
• You need LOTS of ideas; lots of ideas come from
lots of input
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 18 --

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 18 --

“Jump into the conversation already
going on in the mind of the prospect.”
- Robert Collier
• What is top of mind for the prospect?
• What is the prospect hearing a lot about right
now?
• What is the prospect already discussing?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 18 --

Small Tip: Spend time on idea
generation at least weekly.
Dedicated thinking time.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 18 --

Only Write Copy For
Hooks & Ideas Which You
Are 	Wildly 	Excited 	About!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 18 --
